title: The Passport (Third Amendment) Rules, 2001 (29.10.2001)
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 555] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, NOVEMBER2, 2001/KARTIKA 11,1923 3414 GI/2001 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART H—SEC. 3 (i)] MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS CORRIGENDUM New Delhi, the 29th October, 2001 G.S.R 817(E>—In partial modification of GSR576(E) published on page 10 of the Gazette of India Extraordinary dated 27-7-2001, para 1(1) of Part II, Section 3(i) maybe substituted by the following : 1. (1) These rules may be called by the Passport (Thiid Amendment) Rules, 2001. Note: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide number GSR 691 (E), dated the 11th December, 1980, and subsequently amended vide:— (iii) (iv) (v) (vi) (vii) (viii) 0*) (x) (xi) (xii) (•xM) GSR50(E), dated 7-2-1981; GSR 469 (E), dated 24-6-1982; GSR 325 (E), dated 124-1983; GSR482 (E), dated 13-6-1983; GSR 494 (E), dated 16-6-1983; GSR345 (E), dated29-3-1985; GSR 860 (E), dated 8-11-1985; GSR 857 (E), dated 13-10-1987; GSR84 (E), dated 11-2-1988; GSR 1155 (E), dated21-ll-1988; GSR622 (E), dated27-7-1990; GSR 100 (E), dated 4-3-1991; GSR275 (E), dated20-3-1991; (jriv) (w) (xvi) (xvii) (xviii) (XK> (xxO (xxii) (xxffi) (xxiv) (xxv) (xxvi) (xxvil) (xxviii) (wax) (X3B) (mi) (xxxfi) (xxxfli) GSR586(E), dated21-6-1991; GSR 111 (E), dated22-1-1992; GSR 684 (E), dated 15-6-1992; GSR 721 (E), dated 7-8-1992; GSR477 (E), dated 16-6-1993; GSR485 (E), dated 1-7-1993; GSR 503 (E), dated 10-7-1993; GSR 833 (E), dated 2-12-1994; GSR 605 (E), dated 5-10-1998; GSR516(E), dated 8-7-1999; GSR 827 (E), dated 29-12-1999; GSR34(E), dated 12^)1-2000; GSR 472 (E), dated 22^)5-2000; GSR473 (E), dated 22-05-2000; GSR485 (E), dated23-O5-2000; GSR529 (E), dated 8-6-2000; GSR 584 (E), dated 04^)7-2000; GSR 632 (E), dated25-7-2000; GSR 487 (E), dated 26-6-2001; and GSR 527 (E), dated 13-7-2001. |F, No. VIV/531/20/2000] S.R-TayaUtSecy.
